title: The Garden of Gethsemane
text:
Night. The garden is dark and fragrant with olive trees. Jesus prays alone on his knees while the disciples sleep nearby. You hear footsteps — torches approaching through the trees. A crowd of Temple guards, armed. And at the front: Judas.

He walks toward Jesus. He is about to give the sign — a kiss on the cheek — that will tell the guards which man to arrest.

You have seconds. This is the moment the timeline turns on.

choices.text: Step back into the shadows. Let it happen.
Wake the disciples. Shout to warn Jesus that the guards are here.
Step between Judas and Jesus. Block the kiss. Tell the guards they have the wrong man.
